session.summary: Queue-mode to-do 4 was implemented, re-tested by the user, and marked verified. The kanban step is checked, but the broader Queue modes + run hotkeys entry remains in IMPLEMENTING because hotkeys, StatusBar queue depth, and final documentation/rule sync steps are still open.
user_verified: Queue mode no longer creates duplicate or ghost cards.
Only the current in-flight queue placeholder is shown.
Saved cards appear as each generation completes.
Cards persist correctly across project navigation and deletes.
Single mode still behaves after awaiting addGroup/updateGroup mutations.
Loop picks up prompt/model/control changes on the next iteration.
Generation mode survives model changes as a session value.
Stopping Loop re-enables the radio mode selector.
Queue button displays Cue xN according to queued/running work.

plan.current_status: Step 4 checked after explicit user verification.
completed_steps: 1. Add generation mode UI state and controls [x]
2. Refactor Comfy execution handles for queue tracking [x]
4. Backend: queue-aware submission + cancel in commandExecutor + generationService [x]
do_not_do: Do not mark steps 5, 6, or 7 complete until implemented and verified.
Do not move the kanban entry to COMPLETED while those steps remain open.
Do not persist generationMode into project.json, project model settings, or modelSettings.

implementation_notes: Generation mode is session-only via state.generationMode and is not saved into project.json.
PromptBox exposes getRunPayload() so Auto-loop reads the current prompt/model/control values before each next run.
Queue mode button label now renders Cue xN using state.generationQueueCount, including optimistic increments on click.
ComfyUIController routes websocket messages by prompt_id to prevent cross-run completion/progress leaks.
Execution handles expose promptId, seed, and onPromptAck; saved generated items include the seed.
Queue rendering shows only the first running placeholder in Gallery/History to avoid duplicate placeholder cards.
Queue cancel targets the first running queue item; Single and Loop cancel the last active generation.
Loop stop clears queue count when no active generation remains and PromptBoxControls unlocks on promptbox:generation-end.

agent_check_results: generationMode persistence grep returned no matches
verification.manual_user_result: User reported: OK, cool, everything is working now.

next_actions: Implement plan step 6: StatusBar queue depth.
Complete step 7 after the remaining implementation is done, verifying docs/rules match final behavior.
Keep to-do 4 closed unless a new regression is reported.
